title: elaeocarpus musseri
intro: Elaeocarpus musseri is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae, commonly known as the musser's blueberry ash. It is native to Papua New Guinea and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus musseri are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Elaeocarpus musseri is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
